JavaScript benchmark, language feature, and unit tests for JerryScript, plus LED and console test scripts.

## Folders
- **[benchmarks](benchmarks/README.md)**: JavaScript benchmark tests for array filling, function optimization, garbage collection, and loop arithmetic.
- **[jerry](jerry/README.md)**: JavaScript tests for language features, error handling, array and string methods, arithmetic, and regression issues.
- **[jerry-test-suite](jerry/README.md-test-suite)**: JavaScript test scripts for JerryScript covering strings, types, objects, keywords, syntax, and operations.
- **[unit](unit/README.md)**: Unit tests for JerryScript API, ECMA date helpers, heap, libm, literals, numbers, strings, and memory.

## Files
- **[blinky.js](blinky.js.md)**: A script to control LED blinking patterns with adjustable wait times and iterations.
- **[hello.js](hello.js.md)**: A test script that prints "Hello JerryScript!" to the console.
